title: Dany Slicer
about:
Dany Slicer, often misspelled Danny Slicer, is a likely AI-generated TikTok character known for a series of video edit memes where images of him are edited to portray him as a stereotypical villain. Dany Slicer (@DanySlicer) uploaded his first video, a compilation of photos where he poses in ways deemed villainous by viewers, on February 7th, 2026. Memes portraying Slicer as a villain and a man with immense aura went viral over the following days, with the nickname "Steve Jobless" also spreading in regards to Slicer, who arguably resembles Steve Jobs. Some refer to Slicer as the "CEO of Goodcorp."

Later that month, an account for a similarly AI-generated character James Pierce was started as a rival for Slicer, garnering significant virality. The character inspired memes about Slicer fighting Pierce.
origin:
On February 7th, 2026, TikToker [1] @DanySlicer uploaded his first video, garnering over 1.5 million views in four days. The video is an edit compiling several photos of Slicer posing, covered in shadows. That day, he uploaded a second, slideshow post to TikTok [2] consisting of the standalone images, garnering over 6.3 million views in the same span of time.

Some of the top comments under the videos refer to Slicer as a villain, while others joke about him being a divorced dad going through an identity crisis. For example, one of the top comments under the second video is a meme placing Slicer side-by-side with Walter White from Breaking Bad , garnering over 70,000 likes.
